options.vulkanimprovement.meshTerrainRen: Replaces vanilla solid and cutout terrain with the mesh-shader path. Requires the Vulkan graphics API.
options.vulkanimprovement.meshTranslucen: Routes translucent terrain through the mesh-shader path. Requires Mesh Terrain. Disabled by default until water ordering matches vanilla.
options.vulkanimprovement.meshletFrustum: Enables shader-side meshlet frustum culling. Requires Mesh Terrain. Leave off while checking for edge-of-screen chunk holes.
options.vulkanimprovement.drawAllCapture: Draws all captured solid and cutout mesh terrain instead of the visible-list subset. Requires Mesh Terrain. Heavy diagnostic mode.
options.vulkanimprovement.vanillaChunkVi: Applies vanilla chunk-section fade to mesh terrain. Requires Mesh Terrain.
options.vulkanimprovement.terrainFragmen: Applies Vulkan fragment shading rate to terrain. Requires Mesh Terrain and GPU support.
